_meta.method: Web research across Zenbuddhistiska Samfundet (zazen.se), Plum Village Sverige, AZI directories, Sanbo Zen Sweden, Zen Peacemakers, individual center sites
_meta.coverageEstimate: ~85-90% of organized Zen centers; smaller informal sitting groups likely undercounted
knownGaps: Some Plum Village 'Wake Up' style sanghas have only Facebook presence; durability uncertain
Sanbo Zen Sverige presence: Gundula Meyer Roshi guides a Swedish zendo per Sanbo Zen International, but a distinct standalone Swedish Sanbo Zen site/URL was not located
Kwan Um School: no Swedish center listed in Kwan Um Europe directory
Solrossanghan and Ljungsanghan Plum Village groups have no published city

places.name: Zengården
places.lineage: Sanbo / Cloud-Water Sangha (Kapleau / Bodhin Kjolhede / Yasutani-Harada lineage)
places.notes: Head temple and residential retreat center of Zenbuddhistiska Samfundet; full-time training year-round since 1995; teachers Sante Poromaa Roshi and Kanja Odland Roshi
